unresolved_behavior_cases.name: ValueTest.compareType
last_errors: case main_valuetest_comparetype: model returned unresolved, reason=Target Rust API does not provide operator< or equivalent comparison predicate required by source assertions checkIsLess, details=Source test uses checkIsLess to compare Json::Value objects of different types, which requires ordering semantics. The aligned target APIs include only PartialEq<&str> and no Ord or PartialOrd implementation for JsonValue. Cannot replicate the expected ordering behavior.

case main_valuetest_copymovearray: model returned unresolved, reason=Target Rust API does not provide array indexing (Index<usize>) or append/get methods, details=Source test creates an array, appends items via append, copies, then checks size and element equality via copy[0] and copy[1]. The target provides len but no Index<usize> for JsonValue, no append, and no get with default. Cannot verify element values.

case main_valuetest_copyobject: model returned unresolved, reason=Target Rust API does not provide copy method for JsonValue and no full Equality between JsonValue instances, details=Source test copies objects using a copy method and checks equality with custom checkIsEqual. The target provides clone via Clone trait but no public copy method, and PartialEq is only implemented against &str, not between two JsonValue. Cannot replicate copying and equality check.

case main_valuetest_czstringcoverage: model returned unresolved, reason=Test logic is implemented in an external helper function runCZStringTests whose body is not provided, details=The source test only calls runCZStringTests(), which is defined outside the snippet. Without its full source or an equivalent target API mapping, the behavior cannot be converted into a replay test.

case main_valuetest_getarrayvalue: model returned unresolved, reason=Target Rust API does not provide array indexing, get method, or isValidIndex equivalent, details=Source test accesses array elements via operator[], uses get method with default, and calls isValidIndex. The target provides len but no Index<usize>, no get, and no isValidIndex. Cannot verify element values or index validity.

last_errors: case main_valuetest_comparetype: model returned unresolved, reason=Target Rust API does not provide operator< or equivalent comparison predicate required by source assertions checkIsLess, details=Source test uses checkIsLess to compare Json::Value objects of different types, which requires ordering semantics. The aligned target APIs include only PartialEq<&str> and no Ord or PartialOrd implementation for JsonValue. Cannot replicate the expected ordering behavior.

case main_valuetest_copymovearray: model returned unresolved, reason=Target Rust API does not provide array indexing (Index<usize>) or append/get methods, details=Source test creates an array, appends items via append, copies, then checks size and element equality via copy[0] and copy[1]. The target provides len but no Index<usize> for JsonValue, no append, and no get with default. Cannot verify element values.

case main_valuetest_copyobject: model returned unresolved, reason=Target Rust API does not provide copy method for JsonValue and no full Equality between JsonValue instances, details=Source test copies objects using a copy method and checks equality with custom checkIsEqual. The target provides clone via Clone trait but no public copy method, and PartialEq is only implemented against &str, not between two JsonValue. Cannot replicate copying and equality check.

case main_valuetest_czstringcoverage: model returned unresolved, reason=Test logic is implemented in an external helper function runCZStringTests whose body is not provided, details=The source test only calls runCZStringTests(), which is defined outside the snippet. Without its full source or an equivalent target API mapping, the behavior cannot be converted into a replay test.

case main_valuetest_getarrayvalue: model returned unresolved, reason=Target Rust API does not provide array indexing, get method, or isValidIndex equivalent, details=Source test accesses array elements via operator[], uses get method with default, and calls isValidIndex. summary.note: public_replay_pass_rate only describes this replay plan; compare replay_plan_fingerprint across runs before comparing pass rates.

source_test_evidence_coverage.description: 3A aligned source 函数中，有 src 测试证据的比例

precise_behavior_evidence_rate.description: public source 函数中，从 leaf-name 测试证据进一步确认有精确行为证据的比例

source_tested_public_function_replay_gap.description: L1 scope 中有精确 src 测试证据但 adapter 未 replay 的 source 函数比例

public_replay_pass_rate.description: 当前已生成 replay plan 内，public replay 通过的 event 数 / public replay 实际执行的 event 数；这是 scoped pass rate，不代表全部 eligible source behavior cases 的全局通过率

aligned_source_replay_coverage.description: L1 source scope 中被 replay 覆盖且通过 3A 对齐验证的 source 函数比例

aligned_target_replay_coverage.description: L1 target scope 中被 replay 触达且通过 3A 对齐验证的 target 函数比例

behavior_case_accounting_rate.description: eligible source behavior cases 中，已 replay 或明确标记为无法转换的比例

behavior_case_replay_coverage.description: eligible source behavior cases 中，成功转换为 replay event 并进入 Rust replay plan 的比例
